description: Spring REST controller with log4j-core in pom.xml but only using SLF4J logging facade, never directly calling Log4j APIs. CVE-2021-44228 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: log4j-core is in pom.xml but App.java imports org.slf4j.Logger and uses LoggerFactory.getLogger(). No direct Log4j API usage anywhere in source.

findings.human_justification: The code only uses SLF4J logging facade (org.slf4j.Logger). Log4j-core is a dependency but its vulnerable JNDI lookup code path is never directly invoked through the SLF4J abstraction layer.
